docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,536.00 FILED BY AMS ASSOCIATES TRANSIATIONS INC AS TO DEFENDANT GROSSMAN PAUL ESQ LAW OFFICES OF PAUL GROSSMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GROSSMAN PAUL ESQ LAW OFFICES OF PAUL GROSSMAN
POS SERVED ON JENNIFER SALGADO FOR GROSSMAN PAUL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMS ASSOCIATES TRANSIATIONS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GROSSMAN PAUL ESQ LAW OFFICES OF PAUL GROSSMAN $1,536.00 PRINCIPAL, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,559.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GROSSMAN PAUL ESQ LAW OFFICES OF PAUL GROSSMAN
